name: qa-manual
description: Manual QA / test-case generation from docs (PRD/specs/Figma) → spreadsheet: cook/plan-tests/analyze/log-bug/count-cases + skills (gen-testcases, plan-testcases, tc-template, log-bug) + quality rules. Output to xlsx + Lark/Google Sheets, supports localized (e.g. Vietnamese) output.
